name: Instagram Ensure Account
description: Checks if the correct Instagram account is active. If not, performs a full login with TOTP 2FA. Use this as a prerequisite step before other Instagram workflows to ensure the right account is active.

params.username: The Instagram username that should be active
params.password: Account password (only used if login is needed)
params.totpSecret: TOTP secret for 2FA (only used if login is needed)

steps.goal: Open Instagram. Dismiss any popups or dialogs. Check if the account '{{username}}' is currently logged in and active. Look at the profile tab or the username at the top of the screen. If '{{username}}' is the active account and you can see the home feed or profile, you are done.

correct_account_active.description: The Instagram account '{{username}}' is currently logged in and active (visible as the current user)

on_home_feed.description: The Instagram home feed is visible with posts/stories and bottom navigation bar

steps.goal: The correct account is not active. From the home feed, long-press the profile picture icon in the bottom-right corner to open the account switcher. If '{{username}}' appears in the list, tap it to switch. If not, tap 'Add Instagram account', then 'Log into existing account'. Enter username '{{username}}' and password '{{password}}', then tap 'Log in'.

on_2fa_or_feed.description: Either a 2FA code screen appeared, or the home feed is visible (if account was already saved)

steps.goal: Use get_totp action with text='{{totpSecret}}' to generate a code. Tap the security code input, paste the code, then tap Continue/Confirm.

past_2fa.description: The 2FA screen is gone — moved to onboarding or home feed

steps.goal: Dismiss any onboarding screens (Save Login Info, Notifications, etc.) by tapping 'Not Now' or 'Skip'. Keep dismissing until you reach the home feed.

on_home_feed.description: The Instagram home feed is visible
